template:
h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.vitalsigns') VitalSigns
div(class='row form-group')
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Temperature
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')
      span. F/C
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.BP')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1 control-label') BP
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.BP')
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')")
    b(class='pull-left',style='padding: 2px 0px;font-size: 20px;') /
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')
      span. mmHg
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')")
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Pulse Rate
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')
      span. bpm

div(class='row form-group')
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Respiratory Rate
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')
      span. bpm
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.height')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Height
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1',style='margin-left: 9px;')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.height',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
      span. cm
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.weight')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Weight
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.weight',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
      span. kg
  div(ng-if='bmiResult && tForm.vitalsigns.weight && tForm.vitalsigns.height')
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1 control-label')  BMI
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1 control-label')
      strong(ng-bind="bmiResult")
div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.chiefComplaints')")
  h4(class='heading1') Chief Complaints
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-offset-1 col-lg-8')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.chiefComplaints', rows='2')
div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.medHistory')",style="margin:0px",class='row')
  h4(class='heading1') Medical History
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.medHistory.previousHistory")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Previous History
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.medHistory.previousHistory', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.medHistory.presentHistory")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Present History
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.medHistory.presentHistory', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.medHistory.presentMedication")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Present Medication
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.medHistory.presentMedication', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.medHistory.drugAllergy")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Drug Allergy
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.medHistory.drugAllergy', rows='2')
div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.clinicalFindings')",style="margin:0px",class='row')
  h4(class='heading1') Clinical Findings
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.clinicalFindings.examinationFindings")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Examination Findings
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.clinicalFindings.examinationFindings', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.clinicalFindings.diagnosis")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Diagnosis
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.clinicalFindings.diagnosis', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.clinicalFindings.advice")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Advice
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.clinicalFindings.advice', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.clinicalFindings.counselling")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Counselling
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.clinicalFindings.counselling', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.clinicalFindings.review")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Review
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.clinicalFindings.review', rows='2')
templateData: {"calculateBMI": function(weight,height){  if( !weight || !height) return null;var result = (weight/(height/100 * height/100)); scope.bmiResult = result.toFixed(2);}}

template:
div(class='row form-group')
  label(class='col-lg-2')  
  label(class='col-lg-2')  
br
br
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.technique')
  label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') TECHNIQUE:
  div(class='col-lg-10 col-md-10 col-sm-10 col-xs-10')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.technique', rows='2')
br
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.findings')
  label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') FINDINGS: 
  div(class='col-lg-10 col-md-10 col-sm-10 col-xs-10')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.findings', rows='8')
br
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.impression')
  label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') IMPRESSION: 
  div(class='col-lg-10 col-md-10 col-sm-10 col-xs-10')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.impression', rows='3')

div(class='form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.DIAGNOSIS',ng-style='func.getStyle(tMode)')
 label(class='control-label') DIAGNOSIS
 textbox(ng-model='tForm.DIAGNOSIS', rows='3')
div(class='form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.COMPLAINTS',ng-style='func.getStyle(tMode)')
 label(class='control-label') COMPLAINTS
 textbox(ng-model='tForm.COMPLAINTS', rows='3')
div(class='form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.EXAMINATION',ng-style='func.getStyle(tMode)')
 label(class='control-label') ON EXAMINATION
 textbox(ng-model='tForm.EXAMINATION', rows='4')
div(class='form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.OPINION',ng-style='func.getStyle(tMode)')
  label(class='control-label') OPINION
  textbox(ng-model='tForm.OPINION', rows='3')
div(class='form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.TREATMENT',ng-style='func.getStyle(tMode)')
  label(class='control-label') TREATMENT
  textbox(ng-model='tForm.TREATMENT', rows='3')
div(class='form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.MEDICINE',ng-style='func.getStyle(tMode)')
 label(class='control-label') DISCHARGE MEDICINE
 textbox(ng-model='tForm.MEDICINE', rows='3')
div(class='form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.CONDITION',ng-style='func.getStyle(tMode)')
 label(class='control-label') CONDITION ON DISCHARGE
 textbox(ng-model='tForm.CONDITION', rows='3')
div(class='form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.ADVICE',ng-style='func.getStyle(tMode)')
  label(class='control-label') ADVICE ON DISCHARGE
  textbox(ng-model='tForm.ADVICE', rows='3')
templateData: {"getStyle" : function(mode){if(mode == 'view') return {'margin-left':'20px'};}}

template:
div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns')")
  h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.vitalsigns') VitalSigns
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')")
      label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Temperature
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')
        span. F/C
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.BP')")
      label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1 control-label') BP
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.BP')
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')")
      b(class='pull-left',style='padding: 2px 0px;font-size: 20px;') /
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')
        span. mmHg
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')")
      label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Pulse Rate
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')
        span. bpm

  div(class='row form-group')
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')")
      label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Respiratory Rate
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')
        span. bpm
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.height')")
      label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Height
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1',style='margin-left: 9px;')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.height',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
        span. cm
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.weight')")
      label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Weight
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.weight',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
        span. kg
    div(ng-if='bmiResult && tForm.vitalsigns.weight && tForm.vitalsigns.height')
      label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1 control-label')  BMI
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1 control-label')
        strong(ng-bind="bmiResult")

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.chiefComplaints')")
  h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.chiefComplaints') Chief Complaints
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.chiefComplaints.complaints')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Complaints
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.chiefComplaints.complaints', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group',ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.chiefComplaints.allergies')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Allergies
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.chiefComplaints.allergies', rows='2')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.generalConditions')")
  h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.generalConditions') General Examination
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.generalConditions.diabetes')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Diabetes
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.generalConditions.diabetes', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.generalConditions.hypertension')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Hypertension
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.generalConditions.hypertension', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.generalConditions.cardiacStatus')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Cardiac Status
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.generalConditions.cardiacStatus', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.generalConditions.renalStatus')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Renal Status
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.generalConditions.renalStatus', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.generalConditions.anyOther')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Any Other
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.generalConditions.anyOther', rows='2')

h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.generalConditions') Systemic Examination
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.presentGlassPowers')
  div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-2 col-md-offset-2 col-md-2 col-sm-offset-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-offset-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.presentGlassPowers.OD',class='text-right')
  label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-3 col-sm-3 col-xs-3 control-label', style='#{center}') Present Glass Powers
  div(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.presentGlassPowers.OS')
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.vision')
  div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-2 col-md-offset-2 col-md-2 col-sm-offset-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-offset-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.vision.OD',class='text-right')
  label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-3 col-sm-3 col-xs-3 control-label', style='#{center}') Vision
  div(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.vision.OS')
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.flash')
  div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-2 col-md-offset-2 col-md-2 col-sm-offset-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-offset-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.flash.OD',class='text-right')
  label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-3 col-sm-3 col-xs-3 control-label', style='#{center}') Flash
  div(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.flash.OS')
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.acceptance')
  div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-2 col-md-offset-2 col-md-2 col-sm-offset-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-offset-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.acceptance.OD',class='text-right')
  label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-3 col-sm-3 col-xs-3 control-label', style='#{center}') Acceptance
  div(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.acceptance.OS')
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.addition')
  div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-2 col-md-offset-2 col-md-2 col-sm-offset-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-offset-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.addition.OD',class='text-right')
  label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-3 col-sm-3 col-xs-3 control-label', style='#{center}') Addition
  div(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.addition.OS')
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.postDilatedAcceptance')
  div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-2 col-md-offset-2 col-md-2 col-sm-offset-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-offset-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.postDilatedAcceptance.OD',class='text-right')
  label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-3 col-sm-3 col-xs-3 control-label', style='#{center}') Post Dilated Acceptance (PDA)
  div(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.postDilatedAcceptance.OS')
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.postMydriaticTest')
  div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-2 col-md-offset-2 col-md-2 col-sm-offset-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-offset-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.postMydriaticTest.OD',class='text-right')
  label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-3 col-sm-3 col-xs-3 control-label', style='#{center}') Post Mydriatic Test (PMT)
  div(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.postMydriaticTest.OS')
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.coverTest')
  label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label')  CoverTest
  div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.coverTest', rows='2')

h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.slitLamp') Slit Lamp
h5(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment') Anterior Segment
div(class='row form-group',style='margin-left: 63px;')
  imageedit(style='width:376px;height:253px',class='col-lg-6 col-md-6 col-sm-6 col-xs-6', srct='assets/images/eye_OD.png',ng-model='tForm.slitLampImgOD', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.slitLampImgOD'))
  imageedit(style='width:376px;height:253px',class='col-lg-6 col-md-6 col-sm-6 col-xs-6', srct='assets/images/eye_OS.png',ng-model='tForm.slitLampImgOS', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.slitLampImgOS'))
div(class='form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment.lids')
  div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-2 col-md-offset-2 col-md-2 col-sm-offset-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-offset-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment.lids.OD',class='text-right')
  label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-3 col-sm-3 col-xs-3 control-label', style='#{center}') Lids
  div(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment.lids.OS')
div(class='form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment.conj')
  div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-2 col-md-offset-2 col-md-2 col-sm-offset-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-offset-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment.conj.OD',class='text-right')
  label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-3 col-sm-3 col-xs-3 control-label', style='#{center}') Conj
  div(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment.conj.OS')
div(class='form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment.comea')
  div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-2 col-md-offset-2 col-md-2 col-sm-offset-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-offset-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment.comea.OD',class='text-right')
  label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-3 col-sm-3 col-xs-3 control-label', style='#{center}') Comea
  div(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment.comea.OS')
div(class='form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment.antCh')
  div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-2 col-md-offset-2 col-md-2 col-sm-offset-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-offset-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment.antCh.OD',class='text-right')
  label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-3 col-sm-3 col-xs-3 control-label', style='#{center}') Ant.Ch
  div(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment.antCh.OS')
div(class='form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment.pupil')
  div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-2 col-md-offset-2 col-md-2 col-sm-offset-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-offset-2 col-xs-2')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.slitLamp.anteriorSegment.pupil.OD',class='text-right')
  label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-3 col-sm-3 col-xs-3 control-label', style='#{center}') Pupil

templateData: {"calculateBMI": function(weight,height){  if( !weight || !height) return null;var result = (weight/(height/100 * height/100)); scope.bmiResult = result.toFixed(2);}}

template:
h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.vitalsigns', style="font-weight: bold;") VitalSigns
div(class='row form-group col-xs-offset-1')  
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Temperature
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')
      span fahrenheit
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bp')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Blood Pressure
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bp')
      span(style='padding-left:5%') mmHg 
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')")
    b(class='pull-left',style='padding: 0px 0px;font-size: 20px;font-weight: bold;') /
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')
      
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')")
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Pulse Rate
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')
      span bpm
div(class='row form-group col-xs-offset-1')
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Respiratory Rate
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')
      span bpm
      
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.height')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Height
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.height',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
      span cm
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.weight')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Weight
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.weight',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
      span kg
  div(ng-if='bmiResult && tForm.vitalsigns.weight && tForm.vitalsigns.height')
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label')  BMI
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label')
      strong(ng-bind="bmiResult")
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.spo2')")
    label(class=' col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') SpO2
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.spo2')
      span %

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.history')",style="margin:0px",class='row')
  h4(class='heading1' , ng-if='tMode=="edit" || ( tForm.history.familyHistory || tForm.history.presenting || tForm.history.comorbidities || tForm.history.surgery || tForm.history.addicition )',style="font-weight: bold;") History
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.history.presenting")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Presenting complaints 
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.history.presenting', rows='2')  
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.history.comorbidities")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Comorbidities 
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.history.comorbidities', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.history.surgery")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Surgery / Procedure
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.history.surgery', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.history.addicition")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Addicition
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.history.addicition', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.history.familyHistory")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Family History
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.history.familyHistory', rows='2')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.examination')",style="margin:0px",class='row')
  h4(class='heading1' , ng-if='tMode=="edit" || ( tForm.examination.general || tForm.examination.systemic)',style="font-weight: bold;") Examination
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.examination.general")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') General
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.examination.general', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.examination.systemic")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Systemic
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.examination.systemic', rows='2')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.problems')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Problems
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.problems', rows='2')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.provisional')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Provisional Diagnosis
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.provisional', rows='2')

div(ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText") || tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0')
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Diagnosis(ICD-10) 
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-9' ,style="padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;") 
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12 form-group', style="width:150%;" ,ng-if='tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0 || tMode=="edit"') 
        diagnostic-code(ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCode',t-mode='tMode')
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12',ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText")')

templateData: {"calculateBMI": function(weight,height){  if( !weight || !height) return null;var result = (weight/(height/100 * height/100)); scope.bmiResult = result.toFixed(2);}}

template:
style
  td.gastro {
    border: 1px solid #dddddd;
    text-align: center;
    width: 130px;
  }

  td div.dk{
    width: 165px;
  }
  
  .vertical-rotation {
    transform: rotate(270deg);
  }

h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.vitalsigns.weight || tForm.vitalsigns.bp', style="font-weight: bold;") VitalSigns
div(class='row form-group')
  div(class='col-xs-offset-1') 
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.weight')")
      label(class='col-lg-1 col-xs-1 control-label') Weight
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.weight')
        span kg 
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bp')")
      label(class='col-lg-2  col-xs-2 control-label') Blood Pressure
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-xs-1')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bp')
        span(style='padding-left:5%') mmHg 
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')")
      b(class='pull-left',style='padding: 0px 0px;font-size: 20px;font-weight: bold;') /
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.referredBy')")
  div(class='row form-group')

{"getComplaints" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Day frequency"},{name:"Night frequency"},{name:"Urgency"},{name:"Urge urine leak"},{name:"Dysuria"},{name:"Incomplete evacuation"},{name:"Straining to void"},{name:"Hematuria"},{name:"Dribbling of urine"},{name:"Constipation "},{name:"Fever with chills"},{name:"Flank pain left side"},{name:"Flank pain right side"},{name:"Suprapubic pain"}]; return listData;},"getComorbidities" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"DM"},{name:"HTN"},{name:"TB"},{name:"IHD"},{name:"Asthma"},{name:"Dyslipidemia"}]; return listData;},"getAbdomen" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Hepatomegaly"},
{name:"Splenomegaly"},{name:"Ascites"}]; return listData},"getProstate" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Flat"},{name:"Tender"},
{name:"Nodule"},{name:"Grade I"},{name:"Grade II"},{name:"Grade III"},{name:"Grade IV"},{name:"Firm"},
{name:"Hard"},{name:"Boggy"}]; return listData},"getUrinaryMaster" : function(){ var urinaryMaster=[{name:"Frequency "},
{name:"Hesitancy"},{name:"Nocturia"},{name:"Intermittency"},{name:"Urgency"},{name:"Sensation Of Incomplete Evacuation"},
{name:"Urge Incontinence"}]; return urinaryMaster;},"getInflammationMaster" : function(){ var inflammationMaster = [{name: "ABD Pain"}, 
{name: "Vomiting"},{name: "Burning Micturition"}, {name: "Strangury"},{name: "Dysuria"},{name: "Pyuria"},{name: "Hematuria"},{name: "H/O Contact"}, 
{name: "Fever"},{name: "Urethral Discharge"}]; return inflammationMaster;},"getHaematuriaMaster" : function(){ var haematuriaMaster= [{name: "Painless"},
{name: "Painful"},{name: "Gross"}, {name: "Microscopic"},{name: "Total"},{name: "Initial"},{name: "Terminal"},{name: "Clots"}, 
{name: "Noclots"}]; return haematuriaMaster;},"getRetentionMaster" : function(){ var retentionMaster= [{name: "Acute Retention"}, 
{name: "Dribbling"},{name: "Chronic Retention"}, {name: "Post Void Dribbling"}]; return retentionMaster;},
"getIncontinenceMaster" : function(){ var incontinenceMaster= [{name: "Stress"}, {name: "Mixed"},{name: "Urge"}, 
{name: "Overflow"},{name: "Total"},{name: "Nocturnal Enuresis"}]; return incontinenceMaster;},
"getTestesMaster" : function(){ var testesMaster= [{name: "Pain"}, {name: "Undescended"},
{name: "Swelling"},{name: "Mixed"},{name: "Trauma"}, {name: "Fever"}]; return testesMaster;},
"getPenisMaster" : function(){ var penisMaster= [{name: "Inability To Retract Prepuce"}, 
{name: "Constriction Prepuce"},{name: "Penile Curvature"},{name: "Nodule"},{name: "Glans Lesion"}, 
{name: "Painful Ejaculation"},{name: "Bloody Ejaculate"}]; return penisMaster;},
"getRenalFailureMaster" : function(){ var renalFailureMaster= [{name: "Edema"}, {name: "Vomiting"},
{name: "Hiccoughs"},{name: "Nausea"},{name: "Anorexia"}, {name: "Dyspnoea"}]; return renalFailureMaster;},
"getRightKidney" : function(){ var rightKidneyMaster= [{name: "Normal"}, {name: "Tender"},
{name: "Palpable"},{name: "Mass"},{name: "Bruit"}]; return rightKidneyMaster;},
"getLeftKidney" : function(){ var leftKidneyMaster= [{name: "Normal"}, {name: "Tender"},
{name: "Palpable"},{name: "Mass"},{name: "Bruit"}]; return leftKidneyMaster;}}

template:
div(class='form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.vitalsigns')
  h4(class='heading1', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 5px;") VITAL SIGNS 
  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')  
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')" )
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Temperature (degree F)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')
      
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bp')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Blood Pressure (mmHg)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bp')
       
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')")
      b(class='pull-left',style='padding: 0px 0px;font-size: 20px;font-weight: bold;') /
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')

  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')       
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')")
      label(class=' col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Pulse Rate (bpm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')

    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Respiratory Rate (bpm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')
      
  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')    
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.height')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Height (cm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.height',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
     
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.weight')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Weight (kg)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.weight',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')

  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')    
    div(ng-if='bmiResult && tForm.vitalsigns.weight && tForm.vitalsigns.height')
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label')  BMI
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label')
        div(ng-bind="bmiResult")
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.spo2')")
      label(class=' col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') SpO2 (%)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.spo2')

      input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.enthesities.yes', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.tenderAndShoulderJoint')")
  h4(class='heading1' , ng-if='tMode=="edit" || (tForm.tenderAndShoulderJoint.tj || tForm.tenderAndShoulderJoint.sj || tForm.tenderAndShoulderJoint.esrAndCrp || tForm.tenderAndShoulderJoint.das) ' ,style="font-weight: bold;") Tender / Shoulder Joint

    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')

    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') ESR/CRP
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')

    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Das28

templateData: {"calculateBMI": function(weight,height){  if( !weight || !height) return null;var result = (weight/(height/100 * height/100)); scope.bmiResult = result.toFixed(2);},"getJoinAffectedAtOnset" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Hand Right"},{name:"Hand Left"},{name:"Wrist Right"},{name:"Wrist Left"},{name:"Elbow Right"},{name:"Elbow Left"},{name:"Shoulder Right"},{name:"Shoulder Left"},{name:"Hip Right"},{name:"Hip Left"},{name:"Knee Right"},{name:"Knee Left"},{name:"Ankle Right"},{name:"Ankle Left"},{name:"Foot Right"},{name:"Foot Left"},]; return listData}, "getRedFlags" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Age of onset<20 or >55"},{name:"Major trauma"},{name:"Constant,Progressive non mechanical pain"},{name:"Thoracic pain"},{name:"Pmho cancer"},{name:"Steroid therapy"},{name:"Immunosupperssion"},{name:"Unwell patient"},{name:"Weight loss"},{name:"Widespread neurology"},{name:"Fever"},{name:"Structural deformity"},{name:"Others"},]; return listData}, "getYellowFlags" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Belief that BP is harmful / severely disabling"},{name:"Fear avoidance behaviour"},{name:"Tendency for low mood / Social withdrawl"},{name:"Not working / work absenteeism"},{name:"Expectation on passive treatment to work rather than active involvement "},{name:"Passive coping strategies"},]; return listData}, "getEnthesopathy" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Plantar Fascitis Right"},{name:"Plantar Fascitis Left"},{name:"Tendo Achilles Right"},{name:"Tendo Achilles Left"},{name:"Tibial Tuberosity Right"},{name:"Tibial Tuberosity Left"},{name:"Greater Trochanter Right"},{name:"Greater Trochanter Left"},{name:"Lateral Epicondyle Right"},{name:"Lateral Epicondyle Left"},{name:"Medial Epicondyle Right"},{name:"Medial Epicondyle Left"},]; return listData},"getOtherSymptoms" : function(){ var listData=[{name:" Cardiovascular symptoms/signs"},{name:"Respiratory symptoms/signs"},{name:"Gastrointestinal symptoms/signs"},{name:"CNS symptoms/signs"},{name:"GUT symptoms/signs"}]; return listData}, "getComorbidillness" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Diabetes"},{name:"Asthma"},{name:"Epilepsy"},{name:"Hypothyroid"},{name:"Hypertension"},{name:"IHD"},{name:"RHD"},{name:"Hyperthyroid"},{name:"Other"}]; return listData}, "getGeneralPhysicalExamination" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Peripheral Pulses"},{name:"Clubbing"},{name:"Pallor"},{name:"Lymphadenopathy"},{name:"Pedal edema"},{name:"Icterus"}]; return listData}}

div(class='form-group')
  h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.vitalsigns', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") VITAL SIGNS 
  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')  
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')" )
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Temperature (degree F)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')
      
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bp')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Blood Pressure (mmHg)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bp')
       
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')")
      b(class='pull-left',style='padding: 0px 0px;font-size: 20px;font-weight: bold;') /
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')

  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')       
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')")
      label(class=' col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Pulse Rate (bpm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')

    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Respiratory Rate (bpm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')
      
  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')    
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.height')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Height (cm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.height',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
     
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.weight')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Weight (kg)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.weight',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')

  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')    
    div(ng-if='bmiResult && tForm.vitalsigns.weight && tForm.vitalsigns.height')
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label')  BMI
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label')
        div(ng-bind="bmiResult")
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.spo2')")
      label(class=' col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') SpO2 (%)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.spo2')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.chiefComplaints')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Chief Complaints
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.chiefComplaints', rows='2')

    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9' ,style="padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;")

        diagnostic-code(ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCode',t-mode='tMode')
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12',ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText")')

  div(class='row form-group')

      textbox(ng-model='tForm.investigationToBeDone', rows='2')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.advice')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Advice 
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.advice', rows='2')

    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Follow Up
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.followUp', rows='2')
templateData: {"calculateBMI": function(weight,height){  if( !weight || !height) return null;var result = (weight/(height/100 * height/100)); scope.bmiResult = result.toFixed(2);}}

template:
div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.informant')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Informant
    div(class='col-lg-5 col-xs-5')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.informant')
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-2 col-xs-2' , ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.followUp')")
      div.checkbox
        input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.followUp', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
        Option(ng-if='tForm.followUp|| tMode=="edit"') F/U
    div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2' , ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.firstVisit')")
      div.checkbox
        input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.firstVisit', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
        Option(ng-if='tForm.firstVisit|| tMode=="edit"') First Visit

        diagnostic-code(ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCode',t-mode='tMode')
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12',ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText")')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.followUpNotes')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-3', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Follow-Up Notes
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-8')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.followUpNotes', rows='2')

h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.vitalsigns', style="font-weight: bold;") VitalSigns
div(class='row form-group col-xs-offset-1')  
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Temperature
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')
      span fahrenheit
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bp')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Blood Pressure
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bp')
      span(style='padding-left:5%') mmHg 
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')")
    b(class='pull-left',style='padding: 0px 0px;font-size: 20px;font-weight: bold;') /
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')
      
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')")
    label(class=' col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Pulse Rate
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')
      span bpm
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Respiratory Rate
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')
      span bpm    
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.height')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Height
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.height',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
      span cm
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.weight')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Weight
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.weight',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
      span kg
  div(ng-if='bmiResult && tForm.vitalsigns.weight && tForm.vitalsigns.height')
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label')  BMI
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label')
      strong(ng-bind="bmiResult")
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.spo2')")
    label(class=' col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') SpO2
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.spo2')
      span %
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.headCircumference')")
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Head Circumference
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.headCircumference')
      span cm

templateData: {"calculateBMI": function(weight,height){  if( !weight || !height) return null;var result = (weight/(height/100 * height/100)); scope.bmiResult = result.toFixed(2);}}

templateData:
{"getPastHistory" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"DM"},{name:"HTN"},{name:"TB"},{name:"IHD"},{name:"Asthma"},
{name:"Dyslipidemia"}]; return listData;},"getExamination" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Pallor"},
{name:"Icterus"},{name:"Edema"},{name:"Lymphadenopathy"}]; return listData},"getAbdomen" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Hepatomegaly"},
{name:"Splenomegaly"},{name:"Ascites"}]; return listData},"getProstate" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Normal"},{name:"Tender"},
{name:"Nodule"},{name:"Prostatomegaly"}]; return listData},"getConsistency" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Normal"},{name:"Firm"},
{name:"Hard"},{name:"Boggy"},{name:"Clinically Benign"},{name:"Suspicious"},{name:"Malignant"},
{name:"Rectual Lumen Infiltration"}]; return listData;},"getUrinaryMaster" : function(){ var urinaryMaster=[{name:"Frequency "},
{name:"Hesitancy"},{name:"Nocturia"},{name:"Intermittency"},{name:"Urgency"},{name:"Sensation Of Incomplete Evacuation"},
{name:"Urge Incontinence"}]; return urinaryMaster;},"getInflammationMaster" : function(){ var inflammationMaster = [{name: "ABD Pain"}, 
{name: "Vomiting"},{name: "Burning Micturition"}, {name: "Strangury"},{name: "Dysuria"},{name: "Pyuria"},{name: "Hematuria"},{name: "H/O Contact"}, 
{name: "Fever"},{name: "Urethral Discharge"}]; return inflammationMaster;},"getHaematuriaMaster" : function(){ var haematuriaMaster= [{name: "Painless"},
{name: "Painful"},{name: "Gross"}, {name: "Microscopic"},{name: "Total"},{name: "Initial"},{name: "Terminal"},{name: "Clots"}, 
{name: "Noclots"}]; return haematuriaMaster;},"getRetentionMaster" : function(){ var retentionMaster= [{name: "Acute Retention"}, 
{name: "Dribbling"},{name: "Chronic Retention"}, {name: "Post Void Dribbling"}]; return retentionMaster;},
"getIncontinenceMaster" : function(){ var incontinenceMaster= [{name: "Stress"}, {name: "Mixed"},{name: "Urge"}, 
{name: "Overflow"},{name: "Total"},{name: "Nocturnal Enuresis"}]; return incontinenceMaster;},
"getTestesMaster" : function(){ var testesMaster= [{name: "Pain"}, {name: "Undescended"},
{name: "Swelling"},{name: "Mixed"},{name: "Trauma"}, {name: "Fever"}]; return testesMaster;},
"getPenisMaster" : function(){ var penisMaster= [{name: "Inability To Retract Prepuce"}, 
{name: "Constriction Prepuce"},{name: "Penile Curvature"},{name: "Nodule"},{name: "Glans Lesion"}, 
{name: "Painful Ejaculation"},{name: "Bloody Ejaculate"}]; return penisMaster;},
"getRenalFailureMaster" : function(){ var renalFailureMaster= [{name: "Edema"}, {name: "Vomiting"},
{name: "Hiccoughs"},{name: "Nausea"},{name: "Anorexia"}, {name: "Dyspnoea"}]; return renalFailureMaster;},
"getRightKidney" : function(){ var rightKidneyMaster= [{name: "Normal"}, {name: "Tender"},
{name: "Palpable"},{name: "Mass"},{name: "Bruit"}]; return rightKidneyMaster;},
"getLeftKidney" : function(){ var leftKidneyMaster= [{name: "Normal"}, {name: "Tender"},
{name: "Palpable"},{name: "Mass"},{name: "Bruit"}]; return leftKidneyMaster;}}

template:
div(class='col-lg-7 col-xs-8')
  h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || (tMode!="edit"  && (tForm.vitalsigns.temperature || tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate || tForm.vitalsigns.BPHigh || tForm.vitalsigns.BPLow || tForm.vitalsigns.height))') VitalSigns
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')")
      label(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2 control-label',ng-if="tMode!='print'") Temperature
      img(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2',ng-if="tMode=='print'",style="height: 30px;float: left;",src="assets/images/temperature.png")
      div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2',style='padding:0px;')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.temperature',style='width:65%;float:left')
        span(style='padding-top: 2px;float: left;width: 35%;text-align: right;') F/C
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')")
      label(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2 control-label',ng-if="tMode!='print'") Pulse Rate
      img(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2',ng-if="tMode=='print'",style="height: 30px;float: left;",src="assets/images/pulse.png")
      div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2',style='padding:0px;')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate',style='width:65%;float:left')
        span(style='padding-top: 2px;float: left;width: 35%;text-align: right;') bpm
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.BPHigh') || validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.BPLow')")
      label(class='col-lg-1 col-xs-1 control-label',ng-if="tMode!='print'") BP
      img(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2',ng-if="tMode=='print'",style="height: 30px;float: left;",src="assets/images/bp.png")
      div(class='col-lg-3 col-xs-2',style='padding:0px;')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.BPHigh',style='width:32%;float:left')
        span(style='padding-top: 2px;float: left;font-size:25px') /
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.BPLow',style='width:32%;float:left')
        span(style='padding-top: 2px;float: left;width: 28%;text-align: right;') mmHg
  div(class='row form-group',style='margin-top: 25px;')
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.height')")
      label(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2 control-label',ng-if="tMode!='print'") Height
      img(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2',ng-if="tMode=='print'",style="height: 30px;float: left;",src="assets/images/height.png")
      div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2',style='padding:0px;')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.height',style='width:65%;float:left',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
        span(style='padding-top: 2px;float: left;width: 35%;text-align: right;') cm
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.weight')")
      label(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2 control-label',ng-if="tMode!='print'") Weight
      img(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2',ng-if="tMode=='print'",style="height: 30px;float: left;",src="assets/images/weight.png")
      div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2',style='padding:0px;')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.weight',style='width:65%;float:left',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
        span(style='padding-top: 2px;float: left;width: 35%;text-align: right;') kg
    div(ng-if='bmiResult && tForm.vitalsigns.weight && tForm.vitalsigns.height')
      label(class='col-lg-1 col-xs-2 control-label')  BMI
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-xs-2 control-label')
        strong(ng-bind="bmiResult")

  div(class='row form-group',style='margin-top: 25px;')
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.ecog')")
      label(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2 control-label') ECOG
      div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2',style='padding:0px;')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.ecog',style='width:72%;float:left')

    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bsa')")
      label(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2 control-label') BSA
      div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2',style='padding:0px;')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bsa',style='width:65%;float:left')
        span(style='padding-top: 2px;float: left;width: 35%;text-align: right;') m 
          sup 2

templateData: {"getPresentingComplaints" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"OBSESSIONAL THOUGHTS"},{name:"LOW SELF ESTEEM"},{name:"LACK OF CONCENTRATION"},{name:"LACK OF MOTIVATION"},{name:"BODY ACHES"},{name:"HEARING OF VOICES"},{name:"AUDITORY HALLUCINATIONS"},{name:"DELUSION OF REFERENCE"},{name:"INSOMNIA"},{name:"LOW APPETITE "},{name:"IRRITABILITY"},{name:"SEXUAL DSYFUNCTION"},{name:"IDEAS OF HOPELESSNESS"},{name:"CONSTANT WORRIES"},{name:"EXCESSIVE THOUGHTS"},{name:"INTERPERSONAL ISSUES"},{name:"MARIAL CONFLICTS"},{name:"ANXIETY"},{name:"NERVOUSNESS"},{name:"SAD MOOD"},{name:"ANTHEDONIA"},{name:"DISTURBED SLEEP"},{name:"PANIC EPISODES"},{name:"LOW ENERGY LEVELS"},{name:"SOMATIC SYMPTOMS"},{name:"VISUAL HALLUCINATIONS"},{name:"DELUSION OF PERSECUTION"},{name:"MEMORY PROBLEMS"},{name:"MOOD SWINGS"},{name:"ANGER DYSCONTROL"},{name:"SUICIDAL IDEAS"},{name:"IDEAS OF WORTHLESSNESS"},{name:"HEALTH RELATED WORRIES"},{name:"ADJUSTMENT ISSUES"},{name:"HEADACHE"}]; return listData;}, "getPremorbid" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"WELL ADJUSTED"},{name:"SHY & INTROVERT"},{name:"EXTROVERT"},{name:"CLUSTER 'B' TRAITS"},{name:"NOT WELL ADJUSTED"},{name:"CLUSTER 'C' TRAITS"},{name:"CLUSTER 'A' TRAITS"}]; return listData;},}

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.bipapAndCpap')",style="margin:0px",class='row')
  h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || (tForm.bipapAndCpap.ipap || tForm.bipapAndCpap.epap) ' , style="font-weight: bold;") BIPAP/ CPAP
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.bipapAndCpap.ipap")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') IPAP
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.bipapAndCpap.ipap', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.bipapAndCpap.epap")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') EPAP
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.bipapAndCpap.epap', rows='2')

  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.vaccination.pneumococcal")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Pneumococcal
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vaccination.pneumococcal', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.vaccination.influenza")')

      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vaccination.influenza', rows='2')

div(ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText") || tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0')
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Diagnosis(ICD-10) 
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-8' ,style="padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;") 
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12 form-group',ng-if='tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0 || tMode=="edit"') 
        diagnostic-code(ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCode',t-mode='tMode')
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12',ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText")') 
        textbox(rows='2', ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCodeText')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.review')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Follow-Up
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.review', rows='2')
templateData: {"getRespiratoryIllnessExamination" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"HR"},{name:"Cynosis"},{name:"Saturation"},{name:"Edema"},{name:"JUP"},{name:"Lymphnode"}]; return listData;}}

template:
h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.vitalsigns.weight', style="font-weight: bold;") VitalSigns
div(class='row form-group col-xs-offset-1')
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.weight')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Weight
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.weight')
      span. kg
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.immunised')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Immunised
    div(class='col-lg-4 col-md-4 col-sm-4 col-xs-5')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.immunised',  rows='2')     

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.paediatricChiefComplaints') && (tMode=='edit' || tForm.paediatricChiefComplaints.length)")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2',ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.paediatricChiefComplaints.length', style="font-weight: bold;margin-left:5px") Chief Complaints
    div(class='col-lg-9 col-xs-9', ng-init='multiListData=func.getComplaints()')
      multi-select-list(id="paediatricChiefComplaints", t-mode="tMode",options="multiListData",selected-model="[]", auto-complete-status='true', ng-model="tForm.paediatricChiefComplaints",is-group='false')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.paediatricPresentation')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin-left:5px") Presentation
    div(class='col-lg-9 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.paediatricPresentation', rows='2')
div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.paediatricExamination')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin-left:5px") Examination
    div(class='col-lg-9 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.paediatricExamination', rows='2')
div(ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.paediatricInvestigation")')   
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin-left:5px") Investigation
    div(class='col-lg-9 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.paediatricInvestigation', rows='2')
div(ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText") || tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0')
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Diagnosis(ICD-10) 
    div(class='col-lg-9 col-xs-9' ,style="padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;") 
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12 form-group',ng-if='tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0 || tMode=="edit"') 
        diagnostic-code(ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCode',t-mode='tMode')
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12',ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText")') 
        textbox(rows='2', ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCodeText')
div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.review')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Follow-Up
    div(class='col-lg-9 col-xs-9')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.review', rows='2')
div(ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.paediatricAdvice")')   
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin-left:5px") Advice
    div(class='col-lg-9 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.paediatricAdvice', rows='2')
templateData: {"getComplaints" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Appetite Change"},{name:"Abdonimal Pain"},{name:"Congestion"},{name:"Constipation"},{name:"Cough"},{name:"Diarrhea"},{name:"Ear Pain Bilateral"},{name:"Ear Pain LT"},{name:"Ear Pain RT"},{name:"Fever"},{name:"Fussiness"},{name:"Headache"},{name:"Rash"},{name:"Redness"},{name:"Runny Nose"},{name:"Teething Syndrome"},{name:"Tonsillitis, acute"},{name:"Upper respiratory infection"},{name:"Urinary tract infection"},{name:"Vomiting"},{name:"Wheezing (non-asthmatic)"},{name:"Well child visit"},{name:"Post OP"},{name:"Follow Up"}]; return listData;}}

template:
div(class='form-group')
  h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.vitalsigns', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") VITAL SIGNS 
  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')  
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')" )
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Temperature (degree F)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')
      
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bp')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Blood Pressure (mmHg)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bp')
       
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')")
      b(class='pull-left',style='padding: 0px 0px;font-size: 20px;font-weight: bold;') /
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')

  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')       
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')")
      label(class=' col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Pulse Rate (bpm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')

    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Respiratory Rate (bpm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')
      
  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')    
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.height')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Height (cm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.height',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
     
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.weight')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Weight (kg)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.weight',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')

  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')    
    div(ng-if='bmiResult && tForm.vitalsigns.weight && tForm.vitalsigns.height')
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label')  BMI
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label')
        div(ng-bind="bmiResult")
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.spo2')")
      label(class=' col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') SpO2 (%)

templateData: {"calculateBMI": function(weight,height){  if( !weight || !height) return null;var result = (weight/(height/100 * height/100)); scope.bmiResult = result.toFixed(2);}}

template:
h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.vitalsigns', style="font-weight: bold;") VitalSigns
div(class='row form-group col-xs-offset-1')  
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Temperature
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')
      span fahrenheit
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bp')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Blood Pressure
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bp')
      span(style='padding-left:5%') mmHg 
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')")
    b(class='pull-left',style='padding: 0px 0px;font-size: 20px;font-weight: bold;') /
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')
      
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')")
    label(class=' col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Pulse Rate
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')
      span bpm
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Respiratory Rate
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')
      span bpm	  
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.height')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Height
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.height',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
      span cm
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.weight')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Weight
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.weight',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
      span kg
  div(ng-if='bmiResult && tForm.vitalsigns.weight && tForm.vitalsigns.height')
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label')  BMI
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label')
      strong(ng-bind="bmiResult")
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.SpO2')")
    label(class=' col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') SpO2
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.SpO2')
      span %
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.GCS')")
    label(class=' col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') GCS
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.GCS')
      
div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.entChiefComplaints') && (tMode=='edit' || tForm.entChiefComplaints.length)")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin-left:5px") Chief Complaints
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-9', ng-init='chiefComplaintsData=func.getChiefComplaintsData()')
      multi-select-list(id="entChiefComplaints", t-mode="tMode",options="chiefComplaintsData",selected-model="[]", auto-complete-status='true', ng-model="tForm.entChiefComplaints",is-group='true')

h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || (tForm.entMedHistory.entPreviousHistory || tForm.entMedHistory.entPresentMedication || tForm.entMedHistory.entFamilyHistory)', style="font-weight: bold;") Medical History
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entMedHistory.entPreviousHistory")')
  label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Previous History
  div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.entMedHistory.entPreviousHistory', rows='2')
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entMedHistory.entPresentMedication")')
  label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Present Medication
  div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.entMedHistory.entPresentMedication', rows='2')
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entMedHistory.entFamilyHistory")')
  label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Family History
  div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.entMedHistory.entFamilyHistory', rows='2')

div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tForm.allergy.length || tMode=="edit"')  
  div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12')
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-8')
      h4(class='heading1', style="font-weight: bold;") Allergy
      div(class='col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-8 form-group', style='padding-left:25%')
        allergy(t-mode='tMode',ng-model='tForm.allergy')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.entClinicalFindings')",style="margin:0px",class='row')
  h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || (tForm.entClinicalFindings.entExaminationFindings.length || tForm.entClinicalFindings.entDiagnosis.length || tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0 || tForm.entClinicalFindings.advice || tForm.entClinicalFindings.counselling || tForm.entClinicalFindings.review || tForm.diagnosisCodeData.data)', style="font-weight: bold;") Clinical Findings
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entClinicalFindings.entExaminationFindings") && (tMode=="edit" || tForm.entClinicalFindings.entExaminationFindings.length)')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Examination Findings
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7  col-xs-9', ng-init='examinationFindingsData=func.getExaminationFindingsData()')
      multi-select-list(id="entExaminationFindings", t-mode="tMode",options="examinationFindingsData",selected-model="[]", auto-complete-status='true', ng-model="tForm.entClinicalFindings.entExaminationFindings",is-group='false')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entClinicalFindings.entDiagnosis") && (tMode=="edit" || tForm.entClinicalFindings.entDiagnosis.length)')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Diagnosis
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9', ng-init='diagnosisData=func.getDiagnosisData()')
      multi-select-list(id="entDiagnosis", t-mode="tMode",options="diagnosisData",selected-model="[]", auto-complete-status='true', ng-model="tForm.entClinicalFindings.entDiagnosis",is-group='true')
  div(class='row form-group',ng-if='tForm.diagnosisCodeData.data || tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0 || tMode=="edit"')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Diagnosis(ICD-10) 
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9' ,style="padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;") 
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12 form-group', style="width:150%;" ,ng-if='tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0 || tMode=="edit"') 
        diagnostic-code(ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCode',t-mode='tMode')
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12',ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeData.data")') 
        textbox(rows='2', ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCodeData.data')   
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entClinicalFindings.advice")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Advice
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.entClinicalFindings.advice', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entClinicalFindings.counselling")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Counselling
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.entClinicalFindings.counselling', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entClinicalFindings.review")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Follow-Up
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.entClinicalFindings.review', rows='2')

template:
div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.laboratoryTest')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-8 row')
      div(class='col-lg-3')
        h4(class='heading1') Laboratory Test
      div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-1 col-sm-8 col-xs-8')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.laboratoryTest')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.pre')")
  h4(class='heading1') Pre
  div(class='row form-group')  
    div(class='col-lg-offset-1 col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-8')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.pre', rows='2')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.post')")
  h4(class='heading1') Post
  div(class='row form-group')  
    div(class='col-lg-offset-1 col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-8')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.post', rows='2')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.others')") 
  h4(class='heading1') Others
  div(class='row form-group')  
    div(class='col-lg-offset-1 col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-8')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.others', rows='2')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.treatmentStartTime')")
  h4(class='heading1') Treatment Start Time
  div(class='row form-group')  
    div(class='col-lg-offset-1 col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-8')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.treatmentStartTime', rows='2')


div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.accessUsed') && (tMode=='edit' || tForm.accessUsed.length)")
  h4(class='heading1') Access Used
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-offset-1 col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-8', ng-init='multiListData=func.getAccessUsed()')
      multi-select-list(id="accessUsed", t-mode="tMode",options="multiListData",selected-model="[]", auto-complete-status='true', ng-model="tForm.accessUsed",is-group='false')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.location')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-12' )
      div(class='col-lg-2', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.location' )
        h4(class='heading1') Location
      div(class='row')
        div(class='col-lg-9' )
          div(class='col-lg-2',ng-if='tMode=="edit"||tForm.location.right')
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.location.right', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.location.right || tMode=="edit"') Right
          div(class='col-lg-2',ng-if='tMode=="edit"||tForm.location.left' )
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.location.left', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.location.left || tMode=="edit"') Left

div(ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.needleSize')
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-12' )
      div(class='col-lg-2')
        h4(class='heading1') Needle Size
      div(class='row')
        div(class='col-lg-2 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
          textbox(ng-model='tForm.needleSize')
      
div(ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.bruitAndThrill')
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-12' )
      div(class='col-lg-2' )
        h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.bruitAndThrill') Bruit/Thrill
      div(class='row')
        div(class='col-lg-9',ng-if='tForm.bruitAndThrill.good|| tMode=="edit"')
          div(class='col-lg-2')
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.bruitAndThrill.good', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.bruitAndThrill.good|| tMode=="edit"') Good
          div(class='col-lg-2',ng-if='tForm.bruitAndThrill.fair|| tMode=="edit"')
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.bruitAndThrill.fair', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.bruitAndThrill.fair|| tMode=="edit"') Fair
          div(class='col-lg-2',ng-if='tForm.bruitAndThrill.poor|| tMode=="edit"')
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.bruitAndThrill.poor', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.bruitAndThrill.poor|| tMode=="edit"') Poor

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.accessFlow'))
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-12' )
      div(class='col-lg-2' )
        h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.accessFlow') Access Flow
      div(class='row')
        div(class='col-lg-9' )
          div(class='col-lg-2',ng-if='tForm.accessFlow.art || tMode=="edit"' )
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.accessFlow.art', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.accessFlow.art || tMode=="edit"') Art
          div(class='col-lg-2',ng-if='tForm.accessFlow.ven || tMode=="edit"' )
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.accessFlow.ven', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.accessFlow.ven || tMode=="edit"') Ven

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.startTime.notes')")
  h4(class='heading1') Notes
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-offset-1 col-lg-8')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.startTime.notes', rows='2')


div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.treatmentEndTime')")
  h4(class='heading1') Treatment EndTime
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-3')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.treatmentEndTime')

h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.hoursCompleted') Hours Completed
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.hoursCompleted')
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.hoursCompleted.dialysis')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label col-xs-offset-1') Dialysis
    div(class='col-lg-2 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.hoursCompleted.dialysis')
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.hoursCompleted.netUF')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Net UF
    div(class='col-lg-2 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.hoursCompleted.netUF')

h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.appearance') Appearance
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.appearance')
