templateData: {"getAccessUsed" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Catheter"},{name:"IJVC"},{name:"Permcath"},{name:"Femoral"},{name:"AV Fistula"},{name:"AV Graft"}]; return listData;},"getAccessFlow" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Art"},{name:"Ven"}]; return listData;},}

template:
h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.vitalsigns', style="font-weight: bold;") VitalSigns
div(class='row form-group col-xs-offset-1')  
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Temperature
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')
      span fahrenheit
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bp')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Blood Pressure
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bp')
      span(style='padding-left:5%') mmHg 
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')")
    b(class='pull-left',style='padding: 0px 0px;font-size: 20px;font-weight: bold;') /
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')
      
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')")
    label(class=' col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Pulse Rate
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')
      span bpm
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Respiratory Rate
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')
      span bpm	  
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.height')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Height
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.height',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
      span cm
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.weight')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') Weight
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.weight',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
      span kg
  div(ng-if='bmiResult && tForm.vitalsigns.weight && tForm.vitalsigns.height')
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label')  BMI
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label')
      strong(ng-bind="bmiResult")
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.SpO2')")
    label(class=' col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') SpO2
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.SpO2')
      span %
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.GCS')")
    label(class=' col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label') GCS
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.GCS')
      
div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.entChiefComplaints') && (tMode=='edit' || tForm.entChiefComplaints.length)")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin-left:5px") Chief Complaints
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-9', ng-init='chiefComplaintsData=func.getChiefComplaintsData()')
      multi-select-list(id="entChiefComplaints", t-mode="tMode",options="chiefComplaintsData",selected-model="[]", auto-complete-status='true', ng-model="tForm.entChiefComplaints",is-group='true')

h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || (tForm.entMedHistory.entPreviousHistory || tForm.entMedHistory.entPresentMedication || tForm.entMedHistory.entFamilyHistory)', style="font-weight: bold;") Medical History
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entMedHistory.entPreviousHistory")')
  label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Previous History
  div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.entMedHistory.entPreviousHistory', rows='2')
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entMedHistory.entPresentMedication")')
  label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Present Medication
  div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.entMedHistory.entPresentMedication', rows='2')
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entMedHistory.entFamilyHistory")')
  label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Family History
  div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9')
    textbox(ng-model='tForm.entMedHistory.entFamilyHistory', rows='2')

div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tForm.allergy.length || tMode=="edit"')  
  div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12')
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-8')
      h4(class='heading1', style="font-weight: bold;") Allergy
      div(class='col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-8 form-group', style='padding-left:25%')
        allergy(t-mode='tMode',ng-model='tForm.allergy')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.entClinicalFindings')",style="margin:0px",class='row')
  h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || (tForm.entClinicalFindings.entExaminationFindings.length || tForm.entClinicalFindings.entDiagnosis.length || tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0 || tForm.entClinicalFindings.advice || tForm.entClinicalFindings.counselling || tForm.entClinicalFindings.review )', style="font-weight: bold;") Clinical Findings
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entClinicalFindings.entExaminationFindings") && (tMode=="edit" || tForm.entClinicalFindings.entExaminationFindings.length)')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Examination Findings
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7  col-xs-9', ng-init='examinationFindingsData=func.getExaminationFindingsData()')
      multi-select-list(id="entExaminationFindings", t-mode="tMode",options="examinationFindingsData",selected-model="[]", auto-complete-status='true', ng-model="tForm.entClinicalFindings.entExaminationFindings",is-group='false')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entClinicalFindings.entDiagnosis") && (tMode=="edit" || tForm.entClinicalFindings.entDiagnosis.length)')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Diagnosis
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9', ng-init='diagnosisData=func.getDiagnosisData()')
      multi-select-list(id="entDiagnosis", t-mode="tMode",options="diagnosisData",selected-model="[]", auto-complete-status='true', ng-model="tForm.entClinicalFindings.entDiagnosis",is-group='true')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText") || tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Diagnosis(ICD-10) 
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9' ,style="padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;") 
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12 form-group',ng-if='tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0 || tMode=="edit"') 
        diagnostic-code(ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCode',t-mode='tMode')
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12',ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText")') 
        textbox(rows='2', ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCodeText')   
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entClinicalFindings.advice")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Advice
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.entClinicalFindings.advice', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entClinicalFindings.counselling")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Counselling
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.entClinicalFindings.counselling', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.entClinicalFindings.review")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Follow-Up
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.entClinicalFindings.review', rows='2')
templateData: {"calculateBMI": function(weight,height){  if( !weight || !height) return null;var result = (weight/(height/100 * height/100)); scope.bmiResult = result.toFixed(2);}}

template:
div(class='form-group')
  h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.vitalsigns', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Vital Signs 
  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')  
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')" )
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Temperature (degree F)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')
      
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bp')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Blood Pressure (mmHg)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bp')
       
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')")
      b(class='pull-left',style='padding: 0px 0px;font-size: 20px;font-weight: bold;') /
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')

  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')       
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')")
      label(class=' col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Pulse Rate (bpm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')

    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Respiratory Rate (bpm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')
      
  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')    
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.height')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Height (cm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.height',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
     
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.weight')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Weight (kg)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.weight',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')

  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')    
    div(ng-if='bmiResult && tForm.vitalsigns.weight && tForm.vitalsigns.height')
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label')  BMI
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label')
        div(ng-bind="bmiResult")
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.spo2')")
      label(class=' col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') SpO2 (%)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.spo2')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.knownCaseSub.length')")
  h4(class='heading1',ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.knownCaseSub.length',style='font-weight:bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;') Known Case Of 
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-xs-offset-1 col-lg-9 col-xs-9', ng-init='multiListData=func.getTestList()')
      multi-select-list(id="test", t-mode="tMode",options="multiListData",selected-model="[]", auto-complete-status='true', ng-model="tForm.knownCaseSub",is-group='false')              

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.nephrologyInitialAssessmentSymptoms.length')")
  h4(class='heading1',ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.nephrologyInitialAssessmentSymptoms',style='font-weight:bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;') Symptoms 
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-xs-offset-1 col-lg-9 col-xs-9', ng-init='multiListData=func.getSymptomsList()')
      multi-select-list(id="nephrologyInitialAssessmentSymptoms", t-mode="tMode",options="multiListData",selected-model="[]", auto-complete-status='true', ng-model="tForm.nephrologyInitialAssessmentSymptoms",is-group='false') 


h4(class='heading1' ,ng-if='tMode=="edit" || (tForm.alternativeMedication.yes || tForm.alternativeMedication.no || tForm.nsaids.yes || tForm.nsaids.no || tForm.nephroToxicMedication.yes || tForm.nephroToxicMedication.no )',style='font-weight:bold') Drug History 
div(class='row')
  label(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2 control-label' ,ng-if='tMode=="edit" || (tForm.alternativeMedication.yes || tForm.alternativeMedication.no )') Alternative Medication
  div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2', ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.alternativeMedication.yes')")
    div.checkbox
      input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.alternativeMedication.yes', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
      Option(ng-if='tForm.alternativeMedication.yes || tMode=="edit"') Yes
  div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2' , ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.alternativeMedication.no')")
    div.checkbox
      input(type='checkbox', value='false', ng-model='tForm.alternativeMedication.no', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
      Option(ng-if='tForm.alternativeMedication.no|| tMode=="edit"') No
div(class='row')
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2 control-label' ,ng-if='tMode=="edit" || (tForm.nsaids.yes || tForm.nsaids.no )') NSAID'S
    div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2', ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.nsaids.yes')")
      div.checkbox
        input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.nsaids.yes', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
        Option(ng-if='tForm.nsaids.yes || tMode=="edit"') Yes
    div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2' , ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.nsaids.no')")
      div.checkbox
        input(type='checkbox', value='false', ng-model='tForm.nsaids.no', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
        Option(ng-if='tForm.nsaids.no|| tMode=="edit"') No
  div(class='row')
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2 control-label' ,ng-if='tMode=="edit" || (tForm.nephroToxicMedication.yes || tForm.nephroToxicMedication.no )') Nephro Toxic Medication
    div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2', ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.nephroToxicMedication.yes')")
      div.checkbox
        input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.nephroToxicMedication.yes', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
        Option(ng-if='tForm.nephroToxicMedication.yes || tMode=="edit"') Yes
    div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2' , ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.nephroToxicMedication.no')")
      div.checkbox
        input(type='checkbox', value='false', ng-model='tForm.nephroToxicMedication.no', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
        Option(ng-if='tForm.nephroToxicMedication.no|| tMode=="edit"') No

    div(class='col-xs-offset-1 col-lg-9 col-xs-9')

    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.oe.j')")
      label(class='col-lg-1 col-xs-1 control-label') J
      div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.oe.j')
  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.oe.pe')")
      label(class='col-lg-1 col-xs-1 control-label') PE
      div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.oe.pe')
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.oe.cl')")
      label(class='col-lg-1 col-xs-1 control-label') CL
      div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.oe.cl')
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.oe.la')")

      div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2')

  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')

      label(class='col-lg-1 col-xs-1 control-label') CVS
      div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2')

    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.oe.cns')")
      label(class='col-lg-1 col-xs-1 control-label') CNS
      div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.oe.cns')
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.oe.pa')")
      label(class='col-lg-1 col-xs-1 control-label') P/A  
      div(class='col-lg-2 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.oe.pa')
  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.oe.rs')")
      label(class='col-lg-1 col-xs-1 control-label') R/S

    div(class='col-xs-offset-1 col-lg-9 col-xs-9')

div(ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText") || tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0')
  h4(class='heading1',style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Diagnosis(ICD-10) 
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-xs-offset-1 col-lg-9 col-xs-9' ,style="padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;") 
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12 form-group',ng-if='tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0 || tMode=="edit"') 
        diagnostic-code(ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCode',t-mode='tMode')
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12',ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText")') 
        textbox(rows='2', ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCodeText')


div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.nephrologyInitialAssesmentFollowUpAdvise')")
  h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.nephrologyInitialAssesmentFollowUpAdvise',style='font-weight:bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;') Follow Up Advice
  div(class='row form-group') 
    div(class='col-xs-offset-1 col-lg-9 col-xs-9')    
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.nephrologyInitialAssesmentFollowUpAdvise', rows='2')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.nephrologyInitialAssesmentTreatment')")
  h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.nephrologyInitialAssesmentTreatment',style='font-weight:bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;') Treatment
  div(class='row form-group') 
    div(class='col-xs-offset-1 col-lg-9 col-xs-9')    
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.nephrologyInitialAssesmentTreatment', rows='2')
templateData: {"calculateBMI": function(weight,height){  if( !weight || !height) return null;var result = (weight/(height/100 * height/100)); scope.bmiResult = result.toFixed(2);}, "getTestList" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Chronic Alcohol"},{name:"Chronic Smoker"},{name:"Non-HTN"},{name:"Non-DM"},{name:"HTN(Hypertension)"},{name:"DM"},{name:"Nephrotic/Nephritic"},{name:"AKI/AKD"},{name:"IHD"},{name:"CKD"},{name:"UTI"},{name:"Renal Calculi"},{name:"Renal Aallograft Recepient"},{name:"ESRD ON DIALYSIS"}]; return listData},"getSymptomsList" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Pedal Edema"},{name:"Dysuria"},{name:"Facial Puffiness"},{name:"Hematuria"},{name:"LUTS"},{name:"Fever"},{name:"Decreased urine output"},{name:"Routine follow"}]; return listData}}

template:
div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.complaints') && (tMode=='edit' || tForm.complaints.length)")
  h4(class='heading1') Chief Complints  
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-offset-1 col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-8', ng-init='multiListData=func.getComplaintsList()')
      multi-select-list(id="complaient", t-mode="tMode",options="multiListData",selected-model="[]", auto-complete-status='true', ng-model="tForm.complaints",is-group='false')     

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vision')")
  h4(class='heading1') Vision Problem
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-offset-1 col-lg-11 col-md-11 col-sm-11 col-xs-11')  
      div      
        div(class='row form-group')
          div(class='col-lg-2' )
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.vision.blurred', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.vision.blurred|| tMode=="edit"') Blurred Vision
          div(class='col-lg-2')
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='false', ng-model='tForm.vision.diplopia', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.vision.diplopia|| tMode=="edit"') Diplopia
          div(class='col-lg-2')
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='false', ng-model='tForm.vision.colored', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.vision.colored|| tMode=="edit"') Colored   


div(class='row form-group')    
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.number')")

templateData: {"getMedicalHistoryList" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"HTN(Hypertension)"},{name:"Dyslipidemia(Cholesterol)"},{name:"CUA"},{name:"IHD"},{name:"PTCA"},{name:"Hypothyroidism"},{name:"CABG"},{name:"Medical Rx"}]; return listData},"getComplaintsList" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Polyuria"},{name:"Polyphagia"},{name:"Thirst"},{name:"Vomiting"},{name:"Pain abdomen"},{name:"Nocturia"},{name:"Paresthesia"},{name:"Wound/Ulcer"},{name:"Fever"}]; return listData}}

template:
h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.preliminary') Preliminary Assessment
div(class='row form-group')
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.preliminary.temperature')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Temperature
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.preliminary.temperature')
      span. F/C
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.preliminary.BP')")
    label(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1 control-label') BP
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.preliminary.BP')
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.preliminary.bpBelow')")
    b(class='pull-left',style='padding: 2px 0px;font-size: 20px;') /
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.preliminary.bpBelow')
      span. mmHg
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.preliminary.pulseRate')")
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Pulse/Respiratory
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.preliminary.pulseRate')
      span. bpm 
      

div(class='row form-group')
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.preliminary.height')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Height
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1',style='margin-left: 9px;')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.preliminary.height',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.preliminary.weight,tForm.preliminary.height)')
      span. cm
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.preliminary.weight')")
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Weight
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.preliminary.weight',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.preliminary.weight,tForm.preliminary.height)')
      span. kg
  div(ng-if='bmiResult && tForm.preliminary.weight && tForm.preliminary.height')
    label(class='col-lg-2 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1 control-label')  BMI
    div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1 control-label')
      strong(ng-bind="bmiResult")   

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.chiefComplaints') && (tMode=='edit' || tForm.chiefComplaints.length)")
  h4(class='heading1') Chief Complaints
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-offset-1 col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-8', ng-init='multiListData=func.getMultiList()')
      multi-select-list(id="chiefComplaints", t-mode="tMode",options="multiListData",selected-model="[]", auto-complete-status='true', ng-model="tForm.chiefComplaints",is-group='false')
            
div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.present')")
  h4(class='heading1') Present Complaints      
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-offset-1 col-lg-8')  
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.present', rows='2')    
div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.medHistory')",style="margin:0px",class='row')
  h4(class='heading1') Medical History
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.medHistory.previousHistory")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Previous History
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.medHistory.previousHistory', rows='2')
  
div(class='row form-group', ng-if='tForm.allergy.length || tMode=="edit"')  
  div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12')
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-8')
      h4(class='heading1') Allergy
      div(class='col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-8 form-group')
        allergy(t-mode='tMode',ng-model='tForm.allergy')

h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || (tForm.clinicalFindings.examinationFindings || tForm.clinicalFindings.diagnosis || tForm.diagnosisCode || tForm.diagnosisCodeText)', style="font-weight: bold;") Clinical Findings
div
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.clinicalFindings.examinationFindings")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Examination Findings
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.clinicalFindings.examinationFindings', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group', ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.clinicalFindings.diagnosis")')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Diagnosis
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-7')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.clinicalFindings.diagnosis', rows='2')
  div(class='row form-group',ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText") || tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0 || tMode=="edit"')
    label(class=' col-lg-2 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') Diagnosis(ICD-10) 
    div(class='col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7 col-xs-9' ,style="padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;") 
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12 form-group',ng-if='tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0 || tMode=="edit"') 
        diagnostic-code(ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCode',t-mode='tMode')
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12',ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText")') 
        textbox(rows='2', ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCodeText')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.review')")
  h4(class='heading1') Follow-Up
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-offset-1 col-lg-8 col-md-8 col-sm-8 col-xs-8')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.review', rows='2')
templateData: {"getMultiList" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"CERVICAL"},{name:"THORACIC"},{name:"LUMBAR"},{name:"SACRAL"},{name:"DEGENERATIVE"},{name:"TUMOR/INFECTION"},{name:"INFLAMMATION"},{name:"OTHERS"}]; return listData},"calculateBMI": function(weight,height){  if( !weight || !height) return null;var result = (weight/(height/100 * height/100)); scope.bmiResult = result.toFixed(2);}}

template:
div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.history')")
  h4(class='heading1') History
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-offset-1 col-lg-8')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.history', rows='2')
  
  div(class='row form-group')
    div(class='col-lg-12 col-xs-offset-1' )
      div(class='row')
        div(class='col-lg-8' )
          div(class='col-lg-2',ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.fever')")
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.fever', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.fever|| tMode=="edit"') Fever
          div(class='col-lg-2' ,ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.bodyAche')")
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.bodyAche', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.bodyAche|| tMode=="edit"') Body Ache
          div(class='col-lg-2',ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.rashes')")
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.rashes', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.rashes|| tMode=="edit"') Rashes
        
        div(class='col-lg-8' )
          div(class='col-lg-2',ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.bleeding')" )
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.bleeding', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.bleeding || tMode=="edit"') Bleeding
          div(class='col-lg-2' ,ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.painAbdomen')")
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.painAbdomen', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.painAbdomen || tMode=="edit"') Pain Abdomen
         
        div(class='col-lg-8' )
          div(class='col-lg-2',ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.looseStool')" )
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.looseStool', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.looseStool || tMode=="edit"') Loose Stool
          div(class='col-lg-2',ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vomiting')" )
            div.checkbox
              label
                input(type='checkbox', value='true', ng-model='tForm.vomiting', ng-if='tMode=="edit"')
                Option(ng-if='tForm.vomiting || tMode=="edit"') Vomiting

div
  div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.examination')")
    h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" ||  tForm.examination.hr.standing || tForm.examination.rr.standing || tForm.examination.bp.standing || tForm.examination.hr.sitting || tForm.examination.rr.sitting || tForm.examination.bp.sitting || tForm.examination.SPO2 || tForm.examination.edema ') Examination
    div(class='row form-group')
      div(class='col-lg-offset-2 col-lg-11 col-md-11 col-sm-11 col-xs-11' )      
        div(class='col-lg-2' )
          div(ng-if='tMode=="edit" ||  tForm.examination.hr.standing || tForm.examination.hr.sitting')
            label(class='col-lg-8 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') HR
        div(class='col-lg-2' )
          div(ng-if='tMode=="edit" ||  tForm.examination.rr.standing || tForm.examination.rr.sitting')
            label(class='col-lg-8 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') RR
        div(class='col-lg-2' )
          div(ng-if='tMode=="edit" ||  tForm.examination.bp.standing || tForm.examination.bp.sitting')
            label(class='col-lg-8 col-md-2 col-sm-2 col-xs-2 control-label') BP
            
    div(class='row form-group') 
      div(class='col-lg-offset-1 col-lg-11 col-md-11 col-sm-11 col-xs-11' )
        div(class='col-lg-1' )
          div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.examination.hr.standing || tForm.examination.rr.standing || tForm.examination.bp.standing')")

  div(class='row form-group',ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.examination.edema || tForm.examination.SPO2')

        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.spo2')

templateData: {"getComorbidities" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Hypertension"},{name:"Thyroid"},{name:"Bronchial Asthma"},{name:"Drug Allergies"},{name:"Diabetes"},{name:"Malignancies"},{name:"Tuberculosis"},{name:"Cardiac Disease"},{name:"Breast Disease"},{name:"Surgeries"},{name:"Others"}]; return listData;}, "getFamilyHistory" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Hypertension"},{name:"Tuberculosis"},{name:"Stroke"},{name:"Diabetes"},{name:"Malignancies"},{name:"Thyroid Disorders"},{name:"Others"}]; return listData;},"getGeneralPhysicalExamination" : function(){ var listData=[{name:"Height"},{name:"Weight"},{name:"BMI"},{name:"Throid"},{name:"Pallor"},{name:"Breast"},{name:"Pulse"},{name:"CVS/RS"},{name:"BP"},{name:"Scars"},{name:"Findings"},{name:"Vulva"},{name:"Cervix"},{name:"Adnexae"},{name:"Vagina"},{name:"Uterus"},{name:"Pap Smear"},{name:"Others"}]; return listData;}}

template:
div(class='form-group')
  h4(class='heading1', ng-if='tMode=="edit" || tForm.vitalsigns', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 5px;") VITAL SIGNS 
  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')  
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')" )
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Temperature (degree F)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.temperature')
      
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bp')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Blood Pressure (mmHg)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-1')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bp')
       
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')")
      b(class='pull-left',style='padding: 0px 0px;font-size: 20px;font-weight: bold;') /
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.bpBelow')

  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')       
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')")
      label(class=' col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Pulse Rate (bpm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.pulseRate')

    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Respiratory Rate (bpm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.respiratoryRate')
      
  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')    
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.height')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Height (cm)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.height',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')
     
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.weight')")
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') Weight (kg)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.weight',ng-change='func.calculateBMI(tForm.vitalsigns.weight,tForm.vitalsigns.height)')

  div(class='row col-xs-offset-1')    
    div(ng-if='bmiResult && tForm.vitalsigns.weight && tForm.vitalsigns.height')
      label(class='col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label')  BMI
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2 control-label')
        div(ng-bind="bmiResult")
    div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.vitalsigns.spo2')")
      label(class=' col-lg-3 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-3 control-label') SpO2 (%)
      div(class='col-lg-1 col-md-1 col-sm-1 col-xs-2')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.vitalsigns.spo2')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.clinicalHistoryAndExamination')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Clinical History & Examination
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.clinicalHistoryAndExamination', rows='2')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.diagnosis')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Diagnosis
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.diagnosis', rows='2')

div(ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText") || tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0')
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Diagnosis(ICD-10) 
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9' ,style="padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;") 
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12 form-group',ng-if='tForm.diagnosisCode.length > 0 || tMode=="edit"') 
        diagnostic-code(ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCode',t-mode='tMode')
      div(class='col-lg-12 col-md-12 col-sm-12 col-xs-12',ng-if='validatePermission("tForm.diagnosisCodeText")') 
        textbox(rows='2', ng-model='tForm.diagnosisCodeText')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.advice')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Advice
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
      textbox(ng-model='tForm.advice', rows='2')

div(ng-if="validatePermission('tForm.review')")
  div(class='row form-group')
    h4(class='heading1 col-lg-2 col-xs-2', style="font-weight: bold;margin: 0 0 0 5px;") Follow-Up
    div(class='col-lg-8 col-xs-9')
        textbox(ng-model='tForm.review', rows='2')
templateData: {"calculateBMI": function(weight,height){  if( !weight || !height) return null;var result = (weight/(height/100 * height/100)); scope.bmiResult = result.toFixed(2);}}
